# AccessibilityDeclarationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.App

**Object**

The data structure that represents the relationship to an app for the accessibility declaration create request resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object AccessibilityDeclarationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.App
```

## Dictionaries

- **AccessibilityDeclarationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.App.Data**: The type and ID of the app resource that you relate with the accessibility declaration resource you create.
